description: Implement Elforsyning Product Categories + Energy Monitoring Module + Thermal Simulation + Cable 3D Routing. These are the data layer and calculation modules that other modules depend on. This covers tests 116-175 (60 failing tests).
steps: 1. Add 8 new product categories to the PRODUCTS object (after the wiringDevices array, before the closing }; of PRODUCTS around line 1462): supplyCables (min 5 items, method D, Cu and Al, with iz/r/x/mm2/material/method fields plus id/brand/model/use_da/use_en/standard), metering (min 5 items including CT types with primaryA/secondaryA fields, covering 100A-800A range), mainFuses (min 12 items: 4+ D02 25-63A and 8+ NH 63-630A, all with sealed:true), earthing (min 5 items including electrode cat with resistance_ohm_typical and length_m fields), cableJoints (min 5 items), cableDucts (min 5 items including pipe cat with color field: red for power, blue for telecom, green for fiber, with use descriptions matching), transformers (min 8 items: 5+ ONAN and 3+ AN cooling, kva range 50-2500, with ukPct 3.5-8%, pkW and p0W positive, pkW*1000 > p0W, EN 50464-1 compliant ranges), terminals (min 5 items). All products need: id, brand, model, use_da, use_en, standard fields.

2. Update the renderBank function categories object (around line 3819) to include the 8 new categories with da/en names: supplyCables:'Forsyningskabler'/'Supply Cables', metering:'Maaling'/'Metering', mainFuses:'Hovedsikringer'/'Main Fuses', earthing:'Jordingssystem'/'Earthing', cableJoints:'Kabelsamlinger'/'Cable Joints', cableDucts:'Kabelkanaler'/'Cable Ducts', transformers:'Transformere'/'Transformers', terminals:'Klemmer'/'Terminals'. Also add row rendering logic for each new category in the items.map section.

3. Add Thermal Simulation module: Add 'thermal' to T.da.modules ('Termisk'), T.en.modules ('Thermal'), T.fa.modules translations. Add THERMAL_CABLE_DATA constant with maxTemp values per DS/HD 60364-5-52 Table 52.1 (PVC:70, XLPE:90). Add thermalState with sensible defaults (ambientTemp:30, nCables:1, loadPercent:50, insulation:'PVC'). Implement thermalCalcDerating(ambientTemp, nCables, insulation) returning combined factor (product of ambient factor per Table B.52.14/15 and grouping factor per Table B.52.17). At 30C/1 cable return 1.0. For PVC at 45C use ~0.79. For conduit grouping factor use 0.70 for 3 cables. For XLPE at 40C use correct B.52.15 value. Implement thermalCalcTemp(loadCurrent, iz, insulation) returning temperature with ceiling rounding (conservative), detecting overload when current>iz. Implement thermalCalcI2t(current, time) returning current^2 * time. Implement thermalGetColor(tempRatio) returning CSS color gradient blue-to-red. Implement renderThermal() with click-only UI (sel-btn buttons, range sliders, no text inputs).

4. Add Cable 3D Routing module: Add 'cable3d' to T.da.modules ('Kabel 3D'), T.en.modules ('Cable 3D'), T.fa.modules translations. Add CABLE3D_CONTAINMENT constant with conduit.maxFill<=0.45 and perforated.maxFill<=0.50. Add cable3dState with conduitDia and trayWidth. Implement cable3dCalcFillRate(type, cableIndices) computing cable area vs containment area with ceiling rounding, returning {fillRate, maxFill, exceeded, totalCableArea, containmentArea, clause:'Table 52.3'}. Cable outer diameters: index 0=7.2mm(1.5mm2), 1=8.4(2.5), 2=9.8(4), 3=10.8(6), 4=13.0(10), 5=15.4(16), 6=18.2(25), 7=20.6(35). Implement cable3dCalcGroupDerating(nCables, method) returning {factor, clause:'B.52.17'} - for perforated tray 3 cables=0.82, for conduit 3 cables=0.70. Implement cable3dCheckBendRadius(insulation, outerDia) returning {factor, minRadius, clause:'IEC 60228'} - PVC factor=6, XLPE factor=8. Implement cable3dCalcHeatDissipation(cableIndices) returning {totalWperM, perCable, cableCount}. Implement cable3dLayoutCircular(cableIndices, radius) returning array of {x,y} positions. Implement renderCable3D() with click-only UI.

5. Add Energy Monitoring module: Add 'energy' to T.da.modules ('Energi Monitor'), T.en.modules ('Energy Monitor'), T.fa.modules translations (Farsi: 'مانیتور انرژی'). Add ENERGY_HARMONIC_SOURCES constant with at least 5 source types (motor:{thd,pf,label}, led, pc, vfd, etc). Add ENERGY_TARIFFS with getHourlyRate(hour) method returning DKK/kWh (peak 17-20 rate > 0.5, night rate lower). Add ENERGY_LOAD_PROFILES with residential/office/industrial arrays of 24 values (0-1 range). Implement energyCalcPowerFactor(loads) returning {pf, clause:'cl.523'} with floor rounding, 1.0 for empty. Implement energyCalcCapacitorSize(currentPF, targetPF, kW) returning {kvar, clause:'cl.523'}, 0 when already at target, ceiling rounding. Implement energyCalcTHD(loads) returning {thd, limit:8.0, exceeded, status:'good'|'poor', clause:'EN 50160'}, 0 for empty. Implement energyCalcDailyCost(profile, tariffs, power) returning {totalCost, totalKWh, hourlyCosts[24], peakHour}. Implement energyCalcPeakShaving(profile) returning {recommendations[], potentialSaving}. Implement energyGetPQStatus(voltage, freq, thd, flicker, unbalance) returning traffic lights {voltage, frequency, thd, flicker, unbalance, clause:'EN 50160'}. Implement renderEnergy() with click-only UI including range sliders.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'node test-sld.js' shows tests 116-175 all passing (60 tests)
All new product categories have correct data formats matching test assertions
renderBank shows new category buttons when rendered
All calculation functions use conservative rounding (ceiling for danger/cost, floor for capacity/PF)
All UI render functions return HTML with no text input fields, using sel-btn class buttons
verification: node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' to see pass/fail counts
node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep FAIL | wc -l should be significantly reduced
findings: All 60 tests (116-175) pass. Thermal module uses Table B.52.14/15 for ambient derating and B.52.17 for grouping. Cable 3D uses ceiling rounding for fill rate. Energy uses floor rounding for PF. 39 remaining failures are from PDF/TCC/Panel modules (not in scope). Total test results: 136 pass, 39 fail.
